content.title: <RichColor Color="0.7,0.9,1,1">Welcome to BlackBerry Cluster</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue>🌴 Welcome to BLACKBERRY ASA Server 🌴</>

<RichColor Color="1,0.9,0,1">Survive • Build • Dominate</>

<TextStyle.White>Welcome survivor!</>
<TextStyle.White>We are glad to see you on our server.</>
<TextStyle.White>Build your tribe, explore the world and conquer ARK.</>

<RichColor Color="0,1,0,1">Server Features:</>
<TextStyle.White>• Active administration</>
<TextStyle.White>• Balanced gameplay</>
<TextStyle.White>• Events and rewards</>
<TextStyle.White>• Friendly community</>

<RichColor Color="1,0.4,0.4,1">Good luck survivor!</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.8,0,1">Rates</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>XP: x5</>
<TextStyle.White>Harvest: x5</>
<TextStyle.White>Taming: x10</>
<TextStyle.White>Breeding: x20</>
<TextStyle.White>Egg Hatch: x20</>
<TextStyle.White>Maturation: x20</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="0.3,0.8,1,1">Cluster Info</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>• Active admins</>
<TextStyle.White>• Anti-cheat protection</>
<TextStyle.White>• Server events</>
<TextStyle.White>• Growing community</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Website:</>
<TextStyle.White>blackberry.survivalshop.org</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">Main Rules</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>• Respect all players</>
<TextStyle.White>• No cheating or exploiting</>
<TextStyle.White>• No harassment or toxic behavior</>
<TextStyle.White>• Follow admin instructions</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.8,0,1">Punishments</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>Breaking the rules may result in:</>

<TextStyle.White>• Warning</>
<TextStyle.White>• Temporary ban</>
<TextStyle.White>• Permanent ban</>
